name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 15 Sep 2020
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.120"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Improvements","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Improved webstore checkout to improve cart and order data integrity."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with the content export where Visible on Menu and Visible on Sitemap exported "},{"text":"n","bold":true},{"text":" when it should have been "},{"text":"y","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where Stripe credit card payments couldn?t be processed in the control panel while the order was in the pick status."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue loading Amazon category mapping when a mapped Neto category had been deleted."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where sales orders created from an RMA were duplicated after adding a sticky note."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with editable kits preventing checkout with the error "},{"text":"You must order a minimum of 1 component","bold":true},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
